title: Jacobs Doland Beer
description:
Jacobs Doland Beer (JDB) is a specialized foodservice design firm based in New York City, focus
ing on foodservice consulting for various projects across the country. The firm has worked on n
otable projects such as Eleven Madison Park, Mutual of America, and several food halls in New Y
ork City.

We will upload 170gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information, client documents (D
OB, name, address and so on), financials, credit card statements, contracts and agreements, NDA
s, internal confidential files and so on.
